title: Lost Features
description: Adds some features that didn't quite make it into the game.
body:
Lost Features adds features that were supposed to be in the game, but weren't added. There are versions of this mod for both [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.html) and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/), the Fabric version requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

Current Features

Fireflies

  • Spawn in the Mangrove Swamp biome at night.

Sculk Jaw

  • A Sculk block that bites entities that happen to step on it.

Barnacle (Monster of the Ocean Depths)

  • Pulls players underwater with its tongue. Spawns in deep ocean biomes.

Wildfire (Hovering Inferno)

  • Has 4 shields that orbit around it.
  • Takes less damage the more shields it has.
  • Spawns in Nether Fortresses.

Moobloom

  • A special cow that bees like.

Chillager (Iceologer)

  • Summons falling ice above its target.
  • Spawns in raids.

Ice Chunk

  • Summoned by the Chillager, falls and deals damage on impact.

Copper Golem

  • Can be summoned with a carved pumpkin on top of a copper or cut copper block.

Tuff Golem

  • Can be summoned with a carved pumpkin on top of tuff.
  • Picks up items to display them.

Ostrich

  • Spawns in savanna biomes.
  • Can be bread with flowers.

Baobab Trees Wood Type

  • These large trees generate in savanna biomes.
  • The Baobab wood works like other wood types.

Termite Nests

  • Termite nests generate in savanna biomes and are made up of Termite Nest, Spire and Core blocks.
  • Nests with Termite Nest Core blocks get bigger over time.

Badlands Cactus

  • A goofy cactus that generates in badlands biomes.
